mapper.insert: INSERT INTO storage.tb_weather ( tm, wd, ws, ta, hm, rn ) VALUES ( #{weather_tm}, #{weather_wd}, #{weather_ws}, #{weather_ta}, #{weather_hm}, #{weather_rn} ) ON CONFLICT (tm) DO UPDATE SET wd = EXCLUDED.wd, ws = EXCLUDED.ws, ta = EXCLUDED.ta, hm = EXCLUDED.hm, rn = EXCLUDED.rn, reg_dt = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT TO_CHAR(days.day, 'MM/DD') as "date", SUBSTRING(i.incident_station_id, 1, 1) as "line_num", i.incident_station_id as "station_id", COUNT(i.incident_id) as "count" FROM ( SELECT generate_series(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '6 days', CURRENT_DATE, '1 day')::date as day ) days LEFT JOIN storage.incident i ON DATE(i.create_at) = days.day /* 역 ID까지 그룹화에 넣어줘야 개별 역 데이터가 유지됩니다 */ GROUP BY days.day, "line_num", i.incident_station_id ORDER BY days.day ASC, "line_num" ASC
